## Summary
DESI Year-1 data presents BAO measurements from over 6 million extragalactic objects spanning redshifts 0.1 < z < 4.2, the most precise BAO measurements to date.

## Evidence
Distance measurements achieve 0.5–2% precision per redshift bin across LRGs, ELGs, quasars, and Ly-α forest tracers.

## Significance
DESI Year-1 already surpasses previous surveys in statistical power and hints at evolving dark energy.
